name: Quantenna Communications, Inc.
description: Quantenna Communications, Inc. was a global leader and innovator of high-performance Wi-Fi solutions. The company specialized in designing and developing advanced Wi-Fi chipsets, system-on-chip (SoC) solutions, and software for wireless local area networking (WLAN) and connected devices. Headquartered in San Jose, California, Quantenna provided high-speed wireless connectivity technology to service providers and consumer electronics manufacturers worldwide. The company was acquired by ON Semiconductor in 2019, integrating its expertise in wireless technology into a broader portfolio of intelligent power and sensing solutions for automotive, industrial, and cloud power applications.
